resources.string: Videos exceeding this resolution will be transcoded. Useful for devices that cannot play 4K content.
Failed to shuffle. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to exit the app?
Please enter the server address (IP or domain/machine name)
Playback not allowed at this time
The administrator has restricted playback of this item at this time
Cannot play this item at this time
Are you sure you want to cancel this ENTIRE SERIES?
beginning with those whose name starts with
Burning in subtitles. This may take a few seconds…
Error streaming live TV. Will re-try…
Play available intros and previews before starting a movie
Failed to add to Watch List
Failed to remove from Watch List
Change background image to selected items
Show a row of new episode pilots for any series you watch
Thank you for considering a donation! Your support helps keep Moonfin alive and enables continued development of new features and improvements.\n\nScan the QR code below to donate:
Every contribution makes a difference. Thank you!
How long to wait before playing the next item
Press any button on the TV remote to assign it
The item didn\'t appear to play as long as its duration. Mark watched?
It doesn\'t appear you have a video capable app installed. This option requires you install a 3rd party application for playing video content.
This episode is missing from your library. Would you like to skip it and continue to the next one?
This episode is missing from your library. Playback will stop.
Select which ratings to display. Multiple ratings will appear on a separate row below metadata.
Unable to connect to server, tried the following addresses: %1$s
This will also remove all associated accounts
Show this library in the home screen and toolbar
No servers found on local network.
Jellyfin requires a server to connect with. Visit the documentation at docs.jellyfin.org or scan the QR code to get started with Jellyfin.
Use series thumbnails when displaying episodes
Enlarge card items when they receive focus
Merge Continue Watching and Next Up
Show all in-progress and next episodes in a single row
Always show the sign in screen
Moonfin requires network permissions to function
Connect to your server to get started.
We couldn\'t find any accounts!\nAdd a new account by pressing the \"Add account\" button.
Starting %1$s early and ending %2$s after schedule
Starting %1$s early and ending on Schedule
Starting on schedule and ending %1$s after schedule
Starting on schedule and ending on schedule
This is an experimental feature. No support is provided.
Enabling this function disables auto sign in
Set an optional PIN to protect your account
Require PIN when switching to this user
Create a new PIN for your account
Delete PIN protection from your account
PIN must be at least 4 digits
To reorder items, press left and right on the D-pad
View the licenses of the libraries used by the Moonfin app
Select which rows appear on your home screen and their order using the left and right dpad buttons
Toggle the random movie/TV shuffle button in the top toolbar
Choose what content type to shuffle: movies, TV shows, or both
Toggle the genres button in the top toolbar
Toggle the favorites button in the top toolbar
Toggle library buttons in the top toolbar
Show a black background behind the subtitles
Server uses version %1$s which is not supported
Server uses unsupported version %1$s. Please update to %2$s or newer
Hide this library from the home screen navigation
Override all rows with the same image type
Video, subtitles, live tv, next up
Always start playback with subtitles off, ignoring server default
1. Open the Jellyfin app on your phone or web browser, and sign in with your account
2. Open the user menu and go to the Quick Connect page
This app is optimized for televisions. We recommend using our mobile app on other devices.
This server uses Jellyfin version %1$s which is unsupported. Please update to Jellyfin %2$s or newer to continue using the app.
Crash reports will be sent to your last used server
Crash reports will not be submitted
Logs will be included in crash reports
Logs will not be included in crash reports
Oops! Something went wrong, a crash report was sent to your Jellyfin server.
The setup of this server has not been completed. Open Jellyfin in a web browser to finish setup before signing in.
App updated to %1$s\nThank you for participating in the Moonfin beta program.
Show option to manage media while browsing
Are you sure you want to delete this item from the server? This action cannot be undone.
Show the Moonfin screensaver while the app is open
Only showing items with an age rating set
Adjust how much to darken the screensaver display. Logo and clock move every 60 seconds to prevent burn-in.
Display a bouncing clock in the screensaver. Clock brightness will match screen dimming level when enabled.
Update your server from %1$s to at least %2$s to continue using the app after the next update.
Use FFmpeg to decode audio, even if platform codecs are available.
Upload a troubleshooting document to the Jellyfin server with information about playback capabilities
Failed to submit document. Your Jellyfin server may prohibit client logs.
Enable Advanced SubStation Alpha subtitle client rendering
No permission to use the microphone. Please enable it in system settings.
Speech recognition is unavailable on your device.
An unexpected error occurred during speech recognition.
Change the app to your own liking
Add subsequent episodes to the queue when playing TV series
You don\'t have any video player apps installed on your device that can open videos from your server.
Enable Media Bar slideshow on home screen
Display a featured content slideshow at the top of the home screen
Where to fetch featured media bar items from
Items with these genres will not appear in the media bar
How many featured items to display in the carousel
Transparency level for info box, arrows, and dots
Play muted YouTube trailers in the media bar after 4 seconds, using SponsorBlock to skip intros. Applies to shows in the home rows as well.
Play a muted video preview on focused movie and episode cards, skipping past intro segments
Enable audio for media bar trailers and card video previews
Play background theme music when viewing media details
Adjust the volume level for background theme music (default: 30%)
Play theme music when focusing on items in home rows
Show Seerr integration in the app
Your Jellyfin password for Seerr authentication
Test the connection to your Seerr server
Please enter server URL and API key
Automatically authenticate using your current Jellyfin account for ~30 days
Unable to connect to Seerr. Please log in again from settings to restore your session.
Enter your Seerr server URL and Jellyfin password above. Test the connection to authenticate and save your session.
Display Seerr button in the main navigation toolbar
Items per Row (3 pages loaded per category)
Number of items to fetch per API request (3 pages are loaded at once)
Hide content tagged as adult/NSFW from Seerr results
Settings synced via Moonfin server plugin
Sync settings with the Moonfin server plugin
Featured content carousel on home screen
Choose how to authenticate with Seerr
Login with your Jellyfin account (cookie-based, 30-day expiration)
Login with Seerr email/password (permanent API key)
After Jellyfin login, generate permanent API key (requires admin permissions)
Generate permanent API key (requires admin permissions in Seerr)
Use a permanent API key from Seerr settings
Get this from Seerr web UI under Settings → General
Clear all Seerr authentication data and cookies
This will clear all authentication data and cookies. You will need to log in again to use Seerr.
Connection managed by Moonfin server plugin
Not authenticated — login required on server
Stop using the server plugin proxy and return to direct connection mode
Reconnect Seerr through the Moonfin server plugin proxy
Failed to connect via Moonfin plugin
Seerr not enabled on server plugin
Configure custom quality profiles, root folders, and servers for requests
Quality profile for HD movie requests (uses server default if not set)
Quality profile for 4K movie requests (uses server default if not set)
Quality profile for HD TV requests (uses server default if not set)
Quality profile for 4K TV requests (uses server default if not set)
Unable to load profiles. Check connection.
Admin permissions required to configure quality profiles
Enable, disable, and reorder rows on the Seerr discover screen
Control blur intensity for all background images across the app
Blur intensity for home screen and discovery backgrounds
Blur intensity for movie, TV show, and episode details pages
Fetch ratings from MDBList API (IMDB, TMDB, Metacritic, Trakt, Letterboxd, etc.)
Get a free API key from mdblist.com/preferences
Please add your MDBList API key in Moonfin Settings
Display source name below each rating value
Show TMDB ratings for individual TV episodes
Get a free API key from themoviedb.org
API key must be at least 16 characters
Choose where the navigation bar appears
Show confirmation dialog when exiting the app
Display libraries and content from all logged-in servers in the home screen and toolbar
Add a Folders entry to browse media by folder structure
Display shuffle button in main toolbar
Display genres button in main toolbar
Display favorites button in main toolbar
Choose which content types to include when shuffling
To install updates, you need to allow this app to install from unknown sources. After enabling, press back to return and try again.
Version %s is available. Tap to update.
No ratings found in your libraries
Selected ratings will be hidden from home rows, libraries, search, and media bar across all servers
Decorative seasonal animations on home screen. Disable if experiencing lag.
Watch together with friends in sync
Allow synchronized playback with other users
Automatically correct playback position during playback
Speed up playback to catch up with the group
Minimum delay before SpeedToSync kicks in: %d ms
Switch to SkipToSync above this delay: %d ms
Duration for speeding up playback: %d ms
Seek to the correct position when too far behind
Minimum delay before SkipToSync kicks in: %d ms
Watch together with friends in sync
Create a new group to start a watch party
